{{Quote|I said, what are you looking at? If I wanted to chat, I would have baked up wastril bread and we'd be having a tea party by now! I don't have any tea, so that's out of the question. Now get!|An Imperial informant, to a spacer|<ref name="InformantConversation">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Conversation with "an Imperial informant"}}</ref>}}
'''Wastril bread''' was a favorite food of the young [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], often prepared by [[Dewlannamapia]] on board the [[Liberator (Liberator-class)|''Trader's Luck'']]. It may have been a traditional [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] food, yet it was known to be quite common on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

==Description==
It was described as a "crumbly" bread with [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] flavorings.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Wastril Bread}}</ref> In addition to fruit, the bread also contained [[Cereal/Legends|cereal]] ingredients.

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', wastril bread used to be craftable by the chef profession, but the schematic was rendered unusable during the game's Publish 6 in [[2004]]. This publish consisted of a revamp to the chef profession.
